title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Randomized Game Elements: The event f
content:
✔ Randomized Game Elements: The event format is unknown until it begins (it could be a debate, a logic game, a literary challenge, etc.).
✔ Mario Party-style “Boo Steal” Mechanic: Players may steal XP, swap items, or alter a major game rule if they succeed.
✔ Whole-Class Involvement: Even neutral players must take sides or be assigned minor roles in the event.

📜 Example: The Event Unfolds
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 341 (chunk 341/555)
